Search Benchmarks [Permalink: Exa Search Benchmarks](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#exa-search-benchmarks) Open benchmarks for evaluating search APIs. ## Benchmarks [Permalink: Benchmarks](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#benchmarks) | Benchmark | Queries | Tracks | Description | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [WebCode](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/webcode-benchmark) | ~840 | Contents, Highlights, RAG, E2E | Code docs extraction, query-aware highlights, long-context QA | | [People Search](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/simple-people-benchmark) | 1,400 | Retrieval | Find people profiles by role, location, seniority | | [Company Search](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/simple-company-benchmark) | ~800 | Retrieval + RAG | Find companies by name, industry, geography, funding | ## WebCode Results [Permalink: WebCode Results](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#webcode-results) **Contents** — extraction fidelity against golden markdown (250 URLs) | Searcher | Completeness | Accuracy | Structure | Signal | Code Recall | Table Recall | ROUGE-L | | --- | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Exa | **82.8** | **89.3** | **81.8** | **94.5** | **96.7** | 91.9 | **83.2** | | Parallel | 74.2 | 89.2 | 80.8 | 77.6 | 94.1 | **92.2** | 73.7 | | Claude | 59.8 | 81.1 | 75.1 | 55.1 | 82.4 | 82.0 | 66.8 | **Highlights** — in-document retrieval given a URL + query (250 queries) | Searcher | Groundedness | Correctness | Avg Tokens | | --- | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Exa | **94.8** | **93.2** | 696 | | Parallel | 85.6 | 86.4 | 858 | | Claude | 81.5 | 85.9 | **319** | **RAG** — full-web retrieval + synthesis (307 queries) | Searcher | Groundedness | Avg Tokens | Citation Prec. | | --- | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Exa | **79.4** | 688 | 0.259 | | Brave | 76.3 | 1229 | **0.328** | | Parallel | 75.3 | 622 | 0.168 | | Perplexity | 64.6 | 754 | 0.220 | | Tavily | 61.1 | 464 | 0.159 | See [webcode-benchmark/](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/webcode-benchmark) for details and [blog post](https://exa.ai/blog/web-code). ## People Search Results [Permalink: People Search Results](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#people-search-results) | Searcher | R@1 | R@10 | Precision | Queries | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | exa | **72.0%** | **94.5%** | **63.3%** | 1399 | | brave | 44.4% | 77.9% | 30.2% | 1373 | | parallel | 20.8% | 74.7% | 26.9% | 1387 | ## Company Search Results [Permalink: Company Search Results](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#company-search-results) Two tracks designed to separate retrieval from fact extraction. **Retrieval Track** — Ranked lists of companies matching criteria (named lookup, attribute filtering, funding queries, composite constraints, semantic descriptions). | Searcher | R@1 | R@5 | R@10 | Precision | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | exa | **61.8%** | **90.6%** | **94.2%** | **65.9%** | | brave | 35.9% | 61.8% | 72.9% | 39.2% | | parallel | 36.6% | 66.3% | 78.6% | 40.4% | **RAG Track** — Extract specific facts (founding year, employee count, funding rounds, founders). Static facts use exact-match; dynamic facts get ±20% tolerance. | Searcher | Accuracy | | --- | --- | | exa | **79%** | | brave | 65% | | parallel | 66% | ## Quick Start [Permalink: Quick Start](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#quick-start) ``` git clone https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks.git cd benchmarks ``` ### WebCode Benchmark [Permalink: WebCode Benchmark](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#webcode-benchmark) ``` cd webcode-benchmark uv sync export EXA_API_KEY="your-key" export OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key" python -m evals.contents --searchers exa tavily parallel --limit 20 python -m evals.highlights --searchers exa tavily parallel --limit 20 python -m evals.rag --searchers exa brave perplexity --limit 20 python -m evals.e2e --info ``` ### People Benchmark [Permalink: People Benchmark](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#people-benchmark) ``` cd simple-people-benchmark uv sync export EXA_API_KEY="your-key" export OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key" pbench --limit 50 ``` ### Company Benchmark [Permalink: Company Benchmark](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#company-benchmark) ``` cd simple-company-benchmark uv sync export EXA_API_KEY="your-key" export OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key" cbench --limit 50 cbench --track retrieval cbench --track rag ``` ## Implementing Your Own Searcher [Permalink: Implementing Your Own Searcher](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#implementing-your-own-searcher) All benchmarks use the same `Searcher` interface: ``` from shared.searchers import Searcher, SearchResult class MySearcher(Searcher): name = "my-search" async def search(self, query: str, num_results: int = 10) -> list[SearchResult]: response = await my_api.search(query, limit=num_results) return [\ SearchResult(url=r.url, title=r.title, text=r.snippet)\ for r in response.results\ ] async def extract(self, url: str, query: str | None = None) -> list[SearchResult]: content = await my_api.extract(url) return [SearchResult(url=url, text=content)] ``` The `search` method is used by retrieval and RAG evals. The `extract` method is used by the contents and highlights evals for URL-based extraction. ## Requirements [Permalink: Requirements](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#requirements) - Python 3.11+ - OpenAI API key (for LLM grading) - Search API credentials ## License [Permalink: License](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#license) MIT ## About Open benchmarks for evaluating search APIs ### Resources [Readme](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#readme-ov-file) ### License [MIT license](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#MIT-1-ov-file) ### Uh oh! Benchmarks](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#benchmarks) | Benchmark | Queries | Tracks | Description | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [WebCode](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/webcode-benchmark) | ~840 | Contents, Highlights, RAG, E2E | Code docs extraction, query-aware highlights, long-context QA | | [People Search](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/simple-people-benchmark) | 1,400 | Retrieval | Find people profiles by role, location, seniority | | [Company Search](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/simple-company-benchmark) | ~800 | Retrieval + RAG | Find companies by name, industry, geography, funding | ## WebCode Results [Permalink: WebCode Results](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#webcode-results) **Contents** — extraction fidelity against golden markdown (250 URLs) | Searcher | Completeness | Accuracy | Structure | Signal | Code Recall | Table Recall | ROUGE-L | | --- | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Exa | **82.8** | **89.3** | **81.8** | **94.5** | **96.7** | 91.9 | **83.2** | | Parallel | 74.2 | 89.2 | 80.8 | 77.6 | 94.1 | **92.2** | 73.7 | | Claude | 59.8 | 81.1 | 75.1 | 55.1 | 82.4 | 82.0 | 66.8 | **Highlights** — in-document retrieval given a URL + query (250 queries) | Searcher | Groundedness | Correctness | Avg Tokens | | --- | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Exa | **94.8** | **93.2** | 696 | | Parallel | 85.6 | 86.4 | 858 | | Claude | 81.5 | 85.9 | **319** | **RAG** — full-web retrieval + synthesis (307 queries) | Searcher | Groundedness | Avg Tokens | Citation Prec. | | --- | :-: | :-: | :-: | | Exa | **79.4** | 688 | 0.259 | | Brave | 76.3 | 1229 | **0.328** | | Parallel | 75.3 | 622 | 0.168 | | Perplexity | 64.6 | 754 | 0.220 | | Tavily | 61.1 | 464 | 0.159 | See [webcode-benchmark/](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/blob/master/webcode-benchmark) for details and [blog post](https://exa.ai/blog/web-code). ## People Search Results [Permalink: People Search Results](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#people-search-results) | Searcher | R@1 | R@10 | Precision | Queries | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | exa | **72.0%** | **94.5%** | **63.3%** | 1399 | | brave | 44.4% | 77.9% | 30.2% | 1373 | | parallel | 20.8% | 74.7% | 26.9% | 1387 | ## Company Search Results [Permalink: Company Search Results](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#company-search-results) Two tracks designed to separate retrieval from fact extraction. **Retrieval Track** — Ranked lists of companies matching criteria (named lookup, attribute filtering, funding queries, composite constraints, semantic descriptions). | Searcher | R@1 | R@5 | R@10 | Precision | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | exa | **61.8%** | **90.6%** | **94.2%** | **65.9%** | | brave | 35.9% | 61.8% | 72.9% | 39.2% | | parallel | 36.6% | 66.3% | 78.6% | 40.4% | **RAG Track** — Extract specific facts (founding year, employee count, funding rounds, founders). Static facts use exact-match; dynamic facts get ±20% tolerance. | Searcher | Accuracy | | --- | --- | | exa | **79%** | | brave | 65% | | parallel | 66% | ## Quick Start [Permalink: Quick Start](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#quick-start) ``` git clone https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks.git cd benchmarks ``` ### WebCode Benchmark [Permalink: WebCode Benchmark](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#webcode-benchmark) ``` cd webcode-benchmark uv sync export EXA_API_KEY="your-key" export OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key" python -m evals.contents --searchers exa tavily parallel --limit 20 python -m evals.highlights --searchers exa tavily parallel --limit 20 python -m evals.rag --searchers exa brave perplexity --limit 20 python -m evals.e2e --info ``` ### People Benchmark [Permalink: People Benchmark](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#people-benchmark) ``` cd simple-people-benchmark uv sync export EXA_API_KEY="your-key" export OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key" pbench --limit 50 ``` ### Company Benchmark [Permalink: Company Benchmark](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#company-benchmark) ``` cd simple-company-benchmark uv sync export EXA_API_KEY="your-key" export OPENAI_API_KEY="your-key" cbench --limit 50 cbench --track retrieval cbench --track rag ``` ## Implementing Your Own Searcher [Permalink: Implementing Your Own Searcher](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#implementing-your-own-searcher) All benchmarks use the same `Searcher` interface: ``` from shared.searchers import Searcher, SearchResult class MySearcher(Searcher): name = "my-search" async def search(self, query: str, num_results: int = 10) -> list[SearchResult]: response = await my_api.search(query, limit=num_results) return [\ SearchResult(url=r.url, title=r.title, text=r.snippet)\ for r in response.results\ ] async def extract(self, url: str, query: str | None = None) -> list[SearchResult]: content = await my_api.extract(url) return [SearchResult(url=url, text=content)] ``` The `search` method is used by retrieval and RAG evals. The `extract` method is used by the contents and highlights evals for URL-based extraction. ## Requirements [Permalink: Requirements](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#requirements) - Python 3.11+ - OpenAI API key (for LLM grading) - Search API credentials ## License [Permalink: License](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#license) MIT ## About Open benchmarks for evaluating search APIs ### Resources [Readme](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#readme-ov-file) ### License [MIT license](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks#MIT-1-ov-file) ### Uh oh! There was an error while loading. [Please reload this page](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks). [Activity](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/activity) [Custom properties](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/custom-properties) ### Stars [**100**\\ stars](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/stargazers) ### Watchers [**1**\\ watching](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/watchers) ### Forks [**17**\\ forks](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/forks) [Report repository](https://github.com/contact/report-content?content_url=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fexa-labs%2Fbenchmarks&report=exa-labs+%28user%29) ## [Releases](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/releases) No releases published ## [Packages\ 0](https://github.com/orgs/exa-labs/packages?repo_name=benchmarks) No packages published ## [Contributors\ 3](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/graphs/contributors) - [![@gabrielcammany](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/18260238?s=64&v=4)](https://github.com/gabrielcammany)[**gabrielcammany** Gabriel Cammany](https://github.com/gabrielcammany) - [![@zywilliamli](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/32046231?s=64&v=4)](https://github.com/zywilliamli)[**zywilliamli** William Li](https://github.com/zywilliamli) - [![@samiy803](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/39687281?s=64&v=4)](https://github.com/samiy803)[**samiy803** Sami Yousef](https://github.com/samiy803) ## Languages - [Python100.0%](https://github.com/exa-labs/benchmarks/search?l=python) You can’t perform that action at this time.
